caseId: <must match the packet's caseId, e.g. broadened-cors>

findings.title: Short risk title
findings.riskType: Diff Drift flag type or your concise category
findings.evidence: Specific code or report evidence — cite the diff/report, do not assume Diff Drift is right

notes: Optional benign observations or report feedback — NOT trust risks. Scoring ignores notes.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
